name: click-to-edit
note: View↔edit on an `editing` flag; PUT persists; props re-render.

name: bulk-update
note: Checkbox changes stage a draft; one POST applies all + toast.

name: click-to-load
note: Fetch next page, concat to page-owned array, re-render.

name: delete-row
note: Round-trip plus keyed `jst-transition`; CSS owns the fade and JST delays removal.

name: edit-row
note: Page owns rows + one `editingId`; other Edit buttons disabled while editing.

name: lazy-load
note: Fetched fragment ships a `<script type="jst">` def + markup; auto-upgraded on insert.

name: inline-validation
note: Plain input (keeps focus) POSTs per keystroke; `<field-status>` renders verdict.

name: infinite-scroll
note: Sentinel row binds the synthetic `onreveal` and calls `swap()` to append the next page; the fragment carries the next sentinel.

name: active-search
note: `oninput` paces the fetch with `changed()` + `debounce()`; `swap()` lands the results.

name: progress-bar
note: A `setInterval` calls `swap()` while the job runs; the done response drops the poller row, so the poll stops itself.

name: value-select (cascading)
note: `change` fetches models, sets a prop on `<model-select>`.

name: tabs-hateoas
note: Each tab fetch returns a fresh component def + markup; auto-upgraded. Pure HATEOAS: JST's core strength.

name: dialogs (custom modal)
note: Server-fed modal content with `jst-transition` for fade/zoom enter and leave.

name: sortable
note: Native HTML5 DnD via `ondragstart/ondragover/ondrop`; reorders a page array + POSTs order. `jst-key` preserves row identity when needed.

name: keyboard-shortcuts
note: A body-level keydown listener: `keys(event, {...})` dispatches on the combo and `swap()` fetches the fragment.

name: polling / update-other-content
note: `setInterval` + `swap(null, url, { swap: 'none' })`; one response updates two regions via `jst-swap-oob`.

name: x-data + counter
note: Params are reactive scope; `el.count = el.count + 1` updates own state.

name: x-text
note: `$(expr)` escaped text interpolation.

name: x-html
note: `$(trustedHTML(expr))` opts out of escaping.

name: x-bind (class & attrs)
note: Interpolation in attribute value and name position.

name: x-on (events + key modifiers)
note: `on<event>` covers listeners; behaviour is plain statements in the body (`event.preventDefault()`, `keys()`, `debounce()`) and `.outside` handles click-away.

name: x-model (text/checkbox/select)
note: `jst-model` binds local text, checkbox, and select state.

name: x-show
note: `style="$(open?'':'display:none')"` keeps node mounted.

name: x-if
note: `$ if (cond) { … }` includes/excludes from render.

name: x-for
note: `$ items.forEach(...)` with `jst-key` when identity matters.

name: x-transition
note: `jst-transition` coordinates enter/leave classes; CSS owns the animation.

name: x-ref + $refs
note: No `$refs` registry; `el.querySelector(...)` instead.

name: x-init
note: `once()` runs setup once after the first DOM commit.

name: x-effect
note: Effect = template body, but coarse (any prop change), not dep-tracked.

name: $dispatch
note: `el.emit(name, detail)` bubbling CustomEvent.

name: $store (global)
note: Shared object passed via props; manually re-published to subscribers.

name: $watch
note: No watch; funnel mutations through one setter that captures old→new.

name: x-cloak
note: **Better:** custom-element `:not(:defined){display:none}`, zero JS.

name: x-teleport
note: jst-behaviors jst-teleport="body" hoists the modal to <body>; a native <dialog> does the modal.

name: dropdown (click-outside)
note: Open/close local state plus `onclick.outside`.

name: tabs
note: Active tab is local state; no gap.

name: Hello World
note: Reactive text exact; the v-model input is manual `.value` + `oninput`.

name: Handling Input
note: "methods" are plain functions from `onclick`.

name: Attribute Bindings
note: Interpolation + `.disabled` prop binding.

name: Conditionals & Loops
note: `$ if/else`, `$ forEach`.

name: Form Bindings (v-model)
note: `jst-model` covers native text, checkbox, radio, select, checkbox-array, and multi-select cases; component v-model conventions are still manual.

name: Simple Component (props)
note: Primitives via attrs, rich via `.todo="$(item)"`.

name: Component events ($emit)
note: `el.emit` + `addEventListener`.

name: Computed
note: Derive inline with `$ const`; no memoization.

name: Watchers
note: Side effect runs in the mutating handler.

name: Lifecycle
note: `once()` covers post-commit setup and returned cleanup; each render covers the example's update counter.

name: Slots (default + named)
note: `$(slot())`, `$(slot('name','fallback'))` native.

name: provide / inject
note: `el.closest()` to read ancestor; not auto-reactive.

name: Template refs
note: `el.querySelector(...)` after render.

name: Class & Style bindings
note: No object/array sugar, but expression-built strings cover it.

name: Fetching Data
note: Fetch/render exact; initial fetch page-driven (no onMounted).

name: Markdown Editor
note: `$(trustedHTML())` renders md; property-aware morphing keeps the textarea stable.

name: Grid (sort/search)
note: Local state; filtered/sorted rows derived inline.

name: TodoMVC
note: Full feature set; edit-focus needs a queued re-focus; manual two-way throughout. *(behaviourally verified)*

name: List transitions
note: `jst-key` + `jst-transition` cover enter/leave/move classes; full FLIP transition-group behavior still needs custom JS.

name: Modal with transition
note: Conditional keyed node plus `jst-transition`; CSS owns enter and leave.

name: useState (counter)
note: A prop is local state; instances independent. *(verified)*

name: Passing props
note: Rich via `.person`, primitives via attrs.

name: Rendering lists (keys)
note: `jst-key` preserves node identity across reorders.

name: Conditional rendering
note: `$ if/else`; empty branch = "render null".

name: Responding to events
note: `on<event>` + `el.emit`; stopPropagation works.

name: Controlled inputs
note: `jst-model` keeps local state as the source of truth; form-property morphing preserves focus/caret.

name: Lifting state up
note: JST's native model.

name: Effects + fetching
note: Guarded render block + stale-response guard; teardown exists via `onDisconnect`, but JST has no effect dependency model.

name: Context (useContext)
note: Prop-drill + page store; intermediates must forward.

name: Refs (useRef)
note: DOM ref via `querySelector`; mutable ref via `el._x`.

name: Children / composition
note: `$(slot())` + named slots 1:1.

name: useReducer
note: Plain `reducer(state, action)` in the page; dispatch reassigns.

name: Thinking in React (filter table)
note: Lifted state, explicit events, derived table rendering, and stable controlled inputs map cleanly.

name: Tic-tac-toe (time travel)
note: Immutable history + currentMove in page; board is a dumb renderer. *(verified incl. time travel)*

name: click-to-edit
note: `<contact-card>` toggles view↔edit on an `editing` flag; PUT persists. fixi's declarative `fx-action`/`fx-target` swap is a 4-line handler.

name: delete-row
note: Page owns the rows; Delete issues `fx-method="delete"` then filters the row out. fixi-core has no built-in confirm.

name: confirm-delete
note: jst-confirm="…" gates the DELETE; jst-swap="delete" removes the row.

name: lazy-load
note: `once()` is the analog of fixi's `fx-trigger="fx:inited"`: fetches a fragment carrying its own `<script type="jst">` def + markup, auto-upgraded.

name: click-to-load
note: "Load More" fetches the next page, concatenates into a page-owned array, re-renders.

name: infinite-scroll
note: Sentinel binds the synthetic `onreveal` and calls `swap()`; the fragment carries the next sentinel.

name: active-search
note: `oninput` paces the fetch with `changed()` + `debounce()`; `swap()` lands the results.

name: inline-validation
note: Plain input (keeps focus) POSTs per keystroke; `<field-status>` renders the verdict; native `required`/`type=email` gate submit.

name: value-select (cascading)
note: Changing make fetches models and sets a prop on `<model-select>` (default `change` trigger).

name: bulk-update
note: "Toggle all" + per-row checkboxes stage a draft; one POST applies all and shows a toast.

name: add-and-reset
note: A "new item" form POSTs, appends the created item to a page-owned list, then resets and refocuses the input.

name: swap-to-property
note: fixi's distinctive `fx-swap` into a property maps 1:1: the response is written straight into `el.value` and `el.className`.

name: relative-target
note: jst-target="closest .row find output" (100% CSS selectors).

name: request-indicator
note: jst-request class on the trigger during the fetch (hx-indicator).

name: polling
note: `setInterval` calls `swap()` every 500ms; a Stop button clears the interval (fixi-core has no polling trigger either).

name: mock-template
note: JST's mock-fetch is the same idea as fixi's `cfg.fetch` override; the fetched fragment carries its own component def and auto-registers.

name: view-transition
note: jst-swap="transition" wraps the swap in the View Transition API.

name: fx-ignore
note: Encapsulate the widget in a component + project its DOM via a slot (moved, not re-rendered). No jst-ignore needed (#6 closed).

name: hello-world
note: `LitElement` + `render()` ↔ a `<script type="jst">` that compiles to a real, inspectable custom element.

name: reactive-properties
note: `@property name` ↔ `props="name"`; `el.name = '…'` re-renders, identical to a reactive property.

name: attribute-vs-property
note: Lit's attribute converter (`count="3"`→Number) ↔ JST's JSON-parsed attribute; rich objects via `.data="$(obj)"`.

name: boolean-attribute
note: Lit `?hidden=${!show}` ↔ JST `.hidden="$(!show)"`, which genuinely adds/removes the boolean attribute.

name: property-expression
note: Lit `.items=${this.items}` ↔ JST `.items="$(arr)"` passing an array to a child.

name: events
note: Lit `@click=${this._handleClick}` ↔ JST `onclick="$(fn)"` mutating a local prop.

name: child-to-parent-events
note: Lit `dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(…,{bubbles,composed}))` ↔ JST `el.emit('item-selected', detail)`; parent binds `onitem-selected`.

name: conditional-rendering
note: Lit `when(cond, a, b)` ↔ JST `$ if (user) {…} $ else {…}` (signed-in/out toggle).

name: list-rendering
note:
Lit `map(items, i => html\`
  • ${i}
    • \`)` ↔ JST `$ items.forEach`.

name: repeat-keyed
note: Lit `repeat(items, i => i.id, tpl)` ↔ JST `forEach` + `jst-key`; reorder preserves node identity and a typed input value.

name: styles
note: Lit's `static styles = css\`…\`` is Shadow-DOM-scoped; JST is light-DOM, so styling is ordinary global CSS; the encapsulation is the genuine gap.

name: classmap-stylemap
note: `classMap`/`styleMap` objects ↔ expression-built class/style strings. No object sugar, but covers every case.

name: ifDefined
note: `ifDefined(x)` ↔ a conditional attribute emitted only when the value is defined, so the attribute appears/disappears.

name: live (forms)
note: `live(x)` ↔ `jst-model`: the prop is the source of truth and property-aware morphing preserves caret/focus while external writes flow back.

name: ref
note: `ref(createRef())` ↔ `el.querySelector(...)` after render: reaches the node to `.focus()`, but it's a manual lookup, not an auto-populated ref.

name: lifecycle
note: `connectedCallback`/`firstUpdated`/`disconnectedCallback` ↔ `once()` (returns cleanup) + `onDisconnect()`; a Remove button proves teardown fires.

name: willUpdate
note: `willUpdate()` ↔ a `$ const fullName = …` derive line in the template, run before render.

name: async until
note: `until(promise, placeholder)` ↔ a `once()`-driven fetch that sets `loading`/`result` props plus a guarded `$ if`; no `until` primitive, async wiring is explicit.

name: context
note: `@lit/context` provide/consume ↔ prop-drill through a page-level store; intermediates must forward and reads aren't auto-reactive.

name: async task
note: `@lit/task` ↔ a hand-written controller: a `productId` change runs a guarded fetch walking a `status` prop through pending→complete→error.

name: reactivity
note: A reassigned attribute re-renders, like Svelte assignment reactivity.

name: props
note: Declared attributes are the prop channel.

name: each-blocks
note: forEach + jst-key mirrors a keyed {#each}.

name: if-blocks
note: $ if/else around template lines.

name: bindings
note: jst-model is bind:value.

name: derived
note: A $ const recomputes each render, like $derived.

name: signals
note: A declared attribute is the signal.

name: derived
note: A $ const is createMemo.

name: show
note: $ if/else is <Show>.

name: for
note: forEach + jst-key is <For>.

name: props
note: Declared attributes pass props.

name: effect
note: once() covers run-after-mount; no per-signal effect.

name: interpolation
note: $(expr) is {{ }}.

name: property-binding
note: .prop="$(expr)" is [prop].

name: event-binding
note: `onclick="fn(event)"` is `(click)`.

name: two-way
note: jst-model is [(ngModel)].

name: control-flow-if
note: $ if/else is @if/@else.

name: control-flow-for
note: forEach + jst-key is @for/track.
